{"society_power": 1.5, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Mao's death, Gang of Four fall, Reform and Opening begin", "reasoning": "The state remained overwhelmingly dominant\u2014despite Cultural Revolution decay and elite turmoil (Lin Biao, Mao's death), institutional rebuilding under Deng and restored elite stability offset those losses, keeping state power steady at 8.5. Society ticks up slightly as the Tiananmen Incident, Democracy Wall, and grassroots decollectivization show faint stirrings of agency, though all remained easily suppressed and atomized."}
